net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Result

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier

    public interface Result
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Result'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Boarding Time
    • Passengers
    • Name
    • Id

    See Also:
    net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.CabinPackage#getResult()

    • Method Detail

      • getBoardingTime

        double getBoardingTime()
        Returns the value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Boarding Time' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.
